triage_flags.notes: mana_cost: {2}{G} present in frontmatter; green-magic present in tags_filter.

trivia_bullets.text: Defiant Survivor is part of Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK), released 2024-09-27. The set is a top-down horror design set on a plane that is literally a single infinite haunted house, consciously distinct from Innistrad by drawing on modern 1980s-style horror rather than gothic literary tradition.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Duskmourn: House of Horror Mechanics

trivia_bullets.text: Carries two of DSK's signature mechanics: Survival (triggered ability requiring the creature to be tapped at start of second main phase) and Manifest Dread (look at top two library cards, put one face-down as a 2/2, other to graveyard). Survival rewards aggressive play by triggering off the same tapped state that proves a creature survived combat.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Duskmourn: House of Horror Mechanics

trivia_bullets.text: "The dark should be scared of me!" — unattributed, voiced in first person by the depicted figure. Functions as a battle cry that inverts the horror genre's power dynamic: the survivor threatens the darkness.

Artist Jessica Fong (handle: anireal) is a Bay Area illustrator with credits in DC Comics' GLAAD Award-winning Poison Ivy series and Wizards of the Coast D&D and MTG work. She had 9 MTG cards as of late 2024.

The GW Survival archetype in DSK draft relies on creatures triggering Survival by attacking. Defiant Survivor's combined Survival + Manifest Dread package made it a notable value engine for that color pair, generating a free face-down creature each turn it attacked and tapped.
sources: draftsim.com: The Ultimate Guide to Duskmourn: House of Horror Draft
